highItems: Merge sasmaster-homepage.html and sasmaster-programming-portal.html into one single file: sasmaster.html. Homepage and portal are views within the same file — no page loads, just smooth view transitions. This is the new canonical file. All future Claude Code edits go to sasmaster.html only. Delete the two old files once merged and verified.
Fix homepage 4-stage color transitions (day → spring green → purple evening → deep night)

Archive old UI files — move sasmaster-homepage.html and sasmaster-programming-portal.html into ~/SaSMaster/archive/. Do NOT delete them. Do NOT integrate them into v7. Claude Design v7 (SaSMaster Portal v7.html) is the new canonical UI file. All future work builds on v7 only.

Integrate Claude Design v7 (src_v7_snapshot/SaSMaster Portal v7.html) into sasmaster.html as the canonical portal view. This replaces the previous Programming Research portal dashboard. Match exactly — do not restyle.
Wire full top navigation: CONTENT · ADVERTISING · MARKETING · CPG · EXCHANGE. Each tab switches the portal view. CONTENT is default active state.
Implement network selector tabs: BET, ESPN, TNT, USA, FX, FOOD, HGTV, DISC, HIST, LIFE. ESPN active by default. Switching network updates all KPI cards and charts.
Wire 3 sub-views per portal: OVERVIEW · MY NETWORK VIEW · RIGHTS & METADATA. Tab switching shows/hides correct panels.
medItems: Build Ad Research portal stub (same pattern as Programming Research)
Implement theme switcher (top-right): Editorial / Paper / Blueprint. Each theme variant already exists in v7 — wire the toggle to apply CSS class.
Keep src_v5_snapshot/ and src_v7_snapshot/ untouched — never overwrite these rollback points.
Write DONE-LOG-ANALYST-MISSION.md — daily agent reads DONE_LOG.md, identifies portal gaps, injects fill tasks
